metadata.target_system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.
ugh, seriously. i was on the phone with support for like an HOUR trying to get my wifi fixed and the guy was SO rude. his name was kevin. kept talkin down to me like i was stupid. 🙄
